productDisplayName: Puma Men's Heroes Graphic Blue T-shirt
description: CompositionIndigo blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton grown in Africa, with ribbed neckline, tape detailing on the inseam of the collar, light blue stitch detailing on the shoulders and behind neckline, bold brand graphic on the chest with satin finish look and brand tab on left sleeve hemFittingRegularWash Care Gentle machine wash with similar colours in cool water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry at low temperature Warm iron Do not dry clean Wash and iron inside out Look cool this summer in this indigo blue tee from puma. The bold brand name lettering on the chest with the yellow circle with the satin sheen adds a dose of vibrant energy to the tee. Team this with jeans and canvas shoes for a casual look. This tee is a product of puma Vision and the Cotton made in Africa tab is a symbol of fair trade practice where the purchase of this product leads to avaluable contribution to the living and working conditions of African farmers and their families. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
